data.html:
// This is your Prisma schema file,
// learn more about it in the docs: https://pris.ly/d/prisma-schema

generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "sqlite"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

// ── 四角角色模型 ──

enum UserRole {
  MCLUB_STAFF    // MCLUB員工 — 全局數據
  SME_OWNER      // SME老闆 — 產品提供者
  AGENT          // Agent — 搵生意
  END_USER       // End User — 最終客戶
}

enum OrderStatus {
  PENDING       // 待確認
  IN_PROGRESS   // 進行中
  COMPLETED     // 已完成
  SETTLED       // 已分帳
}

enum MemberLevel {
  PLAN_A   // 入門級
  PLAN_B   // 進階
  PLAN_C   // 高端
  FULL     // MCLUB全會員
}

enum CommissionStatus {
  PENDING   // 待發放
  PAID      // 已發放
}

enum EventStatus {
  DRAFT       // 草稿
  PUBLISHED   // 已發佈
  CANCELLED   // 已取消
  COMPLETED   // 已完成
}

enum RSVPStatus {
  PENDING     // 待確認
  CONFIRMED   // 已確認
  DECLINED    // 已拒絕
  CHECKED_IN  // 已簽到
}

enum TaskStatus {
  TODO        // 待辦
  IN_PROGRESS // 進行中
  DONE        // 已完成
}

model User {
  id          String    @id @default(cuid())
  email       String    @unique
  password    String    // hashed
  name        String
  phone       String?
  role        UserRole
  avatar      String?
  referredById String?  // Agent who referred this End User
  referredBy  User?     @relation("Referrals", fields: [referredById], references: [id])
  referrals   User[]    @relation("Referrals")
  
  // SME老闆: which products they own
  ownedProducts  Product[] @relation("SMEOwner")
  
  // Agent: clients they referred
  clients     Client[]  @relation("AgentClients")
  
  // Orders placed (End User)
  orders      Order[]   @relation("EndUserOrders")
  
  // Orders where this user is the agent
  agentOrders Order[]   @relation("OrderAgent")
  
  // Commissions received
  commissions Commission[] @relation("CommissionRecipient")
  
  // Events organized
  organizedEvents ClubEvent[] @relation("EventOrganizer")
  
  // Event RSVPs
  eventRSVPs RSVP[] @relation("EventAttendee")
  
  // Timeline events created by this user
  timelineEvents TimelineEvent[] @relation("EventCreator")
  
  // Event tasks assigned to this user
  assignedTasks EventTask[] @relation("TaskAssignee")
  
  createdAt   DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime  @updatedAt
}

model Product {
  id            String   @id @default(cuid())
  name          String   // 產品名稱
  category      String   // 產品分類
  description   String   // 產品描述
  keyPoints     String   // 重點賣點 (JSON array string)
  minInvestment String?  // 最低投資額
  smeOwnerId    String   // SME老闆ID
  smeOwner      User     @relation("SMEOwner", fields: [smeOwnerId], references: [id])
  
  // 佣金規則 (JSON string)
  commissionRules String  // { agentRate, smeRate, mclubRate, type: "percent"|"flat" }
  
  icon          String?  // 圖標emoji
  color         String?  // 主題色
  
  orders        Order[]
  
  createdAt     DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime @updatedAt
}

model Client {
  id            String      @id @default(cuid())
  name          String
  phone         String?
  email         String?
  source        String?     // 客戶來源
  memberLevel   MemberLevel @default(PLAN_A)
  notes         String?
  
  agentId       String      // 推薦Agent
  agent         User        @relation("AgentClients", fields: [agentId], references: [id])
  
  orders        Order[]
  timelineEvents TimelineEvent[]
  
  // LTV計算
  totalSpent    Float       @default(0)
  
  createdAt     DateTime    @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime    @updatedAt
}

model Order {
  id            String       @id @default(cuid())
  productId     String
  product       Product      @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id])
  
  endUserId     String       // 購買的End User
  endUser       User         @relation("EndUserOrders", fields: [endUserId], references: [id])
  
  clientId      String       // 對應的Client記錄
  client        Client       @relation(fields: [clientId], references: [id])
  
  agentId       String?      // 推薦Agent (可為空)
  agent         User?        @relation("OrderAgent", fields: [agentId], references: [id])
  
  status        OrderStatus  @default(PENDING)
  amount        Float        // 訂單金額
  currency      String       @default("HKD")
  
  notes         String?      // 訂單備註
  
  // 佣金已分帳標記
  commissionSettled Boolean @default(false)
  
  commissions   Commission[]
  timelineEvents TimelineEvent[]
  
  createdAt     DateTime     @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime     @updatedAt
}

model Commission {
  id            String           @id @default(cuid())
  orderId       String
  order         Order            @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id])
  
  recipientId   String           // 收款人
  recipient     User             @relation("CommissionRecipient", fields: [recipientId], references: [id])
  
  role          UserRole         // 收款時的角色
  amount        Float            // 佣金金額
  status        CommissionStatus @default(PENDING)
  
  createdAt     DateTime         @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime         @updatedAt
}

model ClubEvent {
  id            String       @id @default(cuid())
  title         String       // 活動名稱
  description   String?      // 活動描述
  category      String       @default("networking") // 活動類別: networking, seminar, dinner, workshop, celebration
  venue         String?      // 地點
  eventDate     DateTime     // 活動日期
  endDate       DateTime?    // 結束日期
  status        EventStatus  @default(DRAFT)
  coverImage    String?      // 封面圖片URL
  
  // 容量
  maxAttendees  Int?         // 最大人數
  isPublic      Boolean      @default(true)  // 是否公開
  
  // 費用
  fee           Float        @default(0)     // 費用
  currency      String       @default("HKD")
  
  // 聯絡人及贊助
  contactPerson String?      // 聯絡人
  sponsor       String?      // 贊助商
  
  // 創建者
  createdById   String
  createdBy     User         @relation("EventOrganizer", fields: [createdById], references: [id])
  
  // RSVP
  rsvps         RSVP[]
  
  // 活動任務
  tasks         EventTask[]
  
  // 活動預算
  budgetItems   EventBudgetItem[]
  
  createdAt     DateTime     @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime     @updatedAt
}

model EventTask {
  id            String       @id @default(cuid())
  eventId       String
  event         ClubEvent    @relation(fields: [eventId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  
  title         String       // 任務名稱
  description   String?      // 任務描述
  status        TaskStatus   @default(TODO)  // 任務狀態
  dueDate       DateTime?    // 截止日期
  priority      String       @default("medium") // low, medium, high
  
  // 負責人
  assigneeId    String?      // 負責人ID
  assignee      User?        @relation("TaskAssignee", fields: [assigneeId], references: [id])
  
  createdAt     DateTime     @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime     @updatedAt
}

model EventBudgetItem {
  id            String       @id @default(cuid())
  eventId       String
  event         ClubEvent    @relation(fields: [eventId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  
  category      String       // 預算類別: venue, catering, decoration, av, marketing, staff, other
  description   String       // 項目描述
  estimatedCost Float        @default(0)  // 預算金額
  actualCost    Float?       // 實際金額
  
  createdAt     DateTime     @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime     @updatedAt
}

model RSVP {
  id            String       @id @default(cuid())
  eventId       String
  event         ClubEvent    @relation(fields: [eventId], references: [id])
  
  userId        String
  user          User         @relation("EventAttendee", fields: [userId], references: [id])
  
  status        RSVPStatus   @default(PENDING)
  notes         String?      // 備註
  guests        Int          @default(0)     // 攜帶人數
  
  createdAt     DateTime     @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime     @updatedAt
  
  @@unique([eventId, userId])  // 每人每活動只能RSVP一次
}

model TimelineEvent {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  clientId    String
  client      Client   @relation(fields: [clientId], references: [id])
  
  orderId     String?  // 關聯訂單（可選）
  order       Order?   @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id])
  
  eventType   String   // 事件類型: "purchase" | "upgrade" | "followup" | "note" | "status_change"
  title       String   // 事件標題
  description String?  // 事件描述
  
  createdById String?  // 誰創建的
  createdBy   User?    @relation("EventCreator", fields: [createdById], references: [id])
  
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
}
